description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design, set on a large, manicured green lawn. The structure features clean white exterior walls, extensive floor-to-ceiling windows, and sliding glass doors that open onto a spacious patio area with outdoor seating and a rectangular swimming pool. The upper floor is cantilevered over the lower level, creating a shaded terrace below, while the rear of the house includes a wooden-clad section, likely a garage or storage area. The landscaping is simple, with the house occupying the center of a square plot bordered by a low curb. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and strong geometric lines. The use of glass and wood accents adds warmth and contrast to the otherwise stark white facade.
description: A sleek, modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a spacious patio with a pool, set on a manicured green lawn. The design features clean lines, white walls, and wood accents.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, patio with lounge chairs, and the swimming pool prominently in front of the house.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the wooden-clad garage or storage area and the cantilevered upper floor over the patio.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the elongated wooden section and the back facade with grouped windows and minimal openings.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the upper story's overhang, the patio area, and the pool, with clear sight of the side windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
